description: In the changelog, add a new release section for version 0.4.0 dated 2023-05-01 immediately before the existing 0.3.0 release section. Under the new section add exactly these bullets: under '### Added', '- Integration with Stripe for payments' and '- Notification center to manage alerts'; under '### Changed', '- Redesigned user profiles page' and '- Updated privacy policy'. Preserve all existing release sections exactly. Do not edit the fenced Markdown example that mentions version 0.4.0, and do not edit the Release template section.
